# Newer Source

April 2026 benchmark results for WidgetFoo systems.

## Findings

The throughput limit of the WidgetFoo system is 500 requests per second (NOT 100 as previously reported).
The January 2026 benchmark data was collected under throttled conditions and underestimates true capacity.
